## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Submit URL '...'
4. See error

## Expected behaviour
What did you expect to happen?

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened? Include any error messages or logs.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.x]
- Browser (if frontend issue): [e.g. Chrome 122]

## Logs
Paste relevant output from `samuraizer.log` or the browser console here (remove any personal URLs or sensitive data).

```
(paste logs here)
```

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here.
